recommendations.title: Interview
recommendations.overview: After falling out with his editor, a fading political journalist is forced to interview America's most popular soap actress.

recommendations.title: Trees Lounge
recommendations.overview: Tommy has lost his job, his love and his life. He lives in a small apartment above the Trees Lounge, a bar which he frequents along with a few other regulars without lives. He gets a job driving an ice cream truck and ends up getting involved with th

recommendations.title: 25th Hour
recommendations.overview: On the eve of a seven-year prison sentence, a New York drug dealer spends his final day of freedom confronting his past, his relationships, and the choices that led to his downfall in a city still reeling from 9/11.

recommendations.title: The Unforgivable
recommendations.overview: A woman is released from prison after serving a sentence for a violent crime and re-enters a society that refuses to forgive her past.

recommendations.title: Barton Fink
recommendations.overview: A renowned New York playwright is enticed to California to write for the movies and discovers the hellish truth of Hollywood.

recommendations.title: John Rabe
recommendations.overview: A true-story account of a German businessman who saved more than 200,000 Chinese during the Nanjing massacre in 1937-38.

recommendations.title: Norman: The Moderate Rise and Tragic Fall of a New York Fixer
recommendations.overview: A financial schemer finds himself in the middle of an international scandal after he becomes a political adviser to the new Prime Minister of Israel.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Bullet
recommendations.overview: A tough, Jewish ex-con just released from prison crosses a powerful drug dealer and former prison rival in his return to a life of crime.

recommendations.title: Same Kind of Different as Me
recommendations.overview: International art dealer Ron Hall must befriend a dangerous homeless man in order to save his struggling marriage to his wife, a woman whose dreams will lead all three of them on the journey of their lives.
